headline: Graham (GHM) Surges 3.5%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Graham (GHM) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: Bernstein Initiates Coverage of Parker-Hannifin (PH) with a Bullish View
summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) is included among the 14 Best S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now According to Analysts. Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) is a Fortune 250 global leader in motion and control technologies. The company helps customers solve complex challenges through expertise in electromechanical systems, filtration, fluid and gas handling, hydraulics, pneumatics, and process control across industrial, […]
